items.title: Waterproofing Chemicals Market to Hit USD 15.77 Billion by 2035, Driven by Urbanization and Infrastructure Expansion | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global waterproofing chemicals market is projected to grow from USD 8.07 billion in 2025 to USD 15.77 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 6.93%, driven by rapid urbanization, infrastructure development, and increased demand for durable buildings. The U.S. market specifically is expected to grow from USD 1.37 billion to USD 2.56 billion by 2035. Asia Pacific is the fastest-growing region with a 9.16% CAGR, while membranes and polymer-based waterproofing technologies dominate the market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed among key players in a market projected to grow at 6.93% CAGR through 2035.
Major chemical company listed among key players in the growing waterproofing chemicals market.
Key player in the waterproofing chemicals market benefiting from infrastructure renovation and construction demand.
Company expanded its sustainable waterproofing product range in 2024 with low-VOC liquid membranes and enhanced durability solutions, positioning itself well in the growing market.
Listed as a key player in the expanding waterproofing chemicals market with significant market presence and product offerings.
